name: Context Lookup
description: Registers a single function-call style tool `context_lookup` that lets agents fetch shared context, tool docs, and topic-indexed knowledge on demand. No auto-injection; agents query by topic name. Tool description is locale-aware (en/zh-TW) and stays short — agents call list_topics on demand.

topicsFile.description: Path to the topic registry JSON file, relative to workspace root (or absolute). Defaults to 'topics.json'.

toolName.description: Override the registered tool name. Defaults to 'context_lookup'.

maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes returned per lookup. Files larger than this are truncated with a note. Defaults to 64000.

skipAgents.description: Agent IDs to skip — the tool will not be registered for these agents.

workspaceRoot.description: Absolute path to workspace root. Only needed if the host does not supply one via api.runtime.workspaceRoot or api.getWorkspaceRoot(). Falls back to ~/.openclaw/workspace (honors OPENCLAW_PROFILE) as last resort.
